mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, name, type, host, port, database_name, username, connection_config, status, last_test_time, last_test_result, description, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM data_source WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, tenant_id, name, type, host, port, database_name, username, connection_config, status, last_test_time, last_test_result, description, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM data_source WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, tenant_id, name, type, host, port, database_name, username, connection_config, status, last_test_time, last_test_result, description, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM data_source WHERE name = #{name} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report_metadata WHERE data_source_id = #{dataSourceId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_source (tenant_id, name, type, host, port, database_name, username, connection_config, status, description, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{host}, #{port}, #{databaseName}, #{username}, #{connectionConfig}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE data_source SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, host = #{host}, port = #{port}, database_name = #{databaseName}, username = #{username}, connection_config = #{connectionConfig}, status = #{status}, last_test_time = #{lastTestTime}, last_test_result = #{lastTestResult}, description = #{description}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
